# PERF-100 negative: cobra.Command with a small RunE and a single flag
lang: go
file: PERF-100-safe.go
---
package main

import (
	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
)

var rootCmd = &cobra.Command{
	Use:   "myapp",
	Short: "My app",
	RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
		return runApp()
	},
}

func init() {
	rootCmd.Flags().String("config", "", "config file path")
}

func runApp() error {
	return nil
}

func main() {
	_ = rootCmd.Execute()
}
